title: 京王杯ジュニアSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Keio Hai Junior Stakes, the
track where Sakura Bakushin O vies for public
attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intent on bowing out of running sprints with a
dazzling finale—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O strides onto the course with
vigor.
